stem:
The correct matching for the following pairs is:
(A) DMA I/O         (1) High speed RAM
(B) Cache           (2) Disk
(C) Interrupt I/O   (3) Printer
(D) Condition Code Register  (4) ALU
reason: Options were incorrectly parsed: the matching items (A)-(D) were treated as MCQ options, and the actual MCQ options A-D were merged into option D text. Correct options are A-D matching answers; correctOptions should be ["D"] not ["D","A"].
